Universal Health International Group Holding Ltd. ( (HK:2211) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Universal Health International Group Holding Ltd. has announced an upcoming board meeting on February 25, 2025, to discuss and approve the interim results for the six months ending December 31, 2024, and consider the declaration of an interim dividend. This announcement highlights the company’s ongoing financial review process, which could potentially impact its financial strategies and shareholder returns.

More about Universal Health International Group Holding Ltd.

Universal Health International Group Holding Ltd. operates within the healthcare industry, focusing on providing a range of health-related products and services. The company is involved in various operations through its subsidiaries and holds a notable presence in the market.

Sidetrade SA ( (FR:ALBFR) ) has provided an update.

Sidetrade has announced a strategic alliance with Interpath, an international advisory firm, to accelerate digital transformation in businesses through AI-driven Order-to-Cash solutions. This collaboration is expected to enhance value creation for clients and expand Sidetrade’s market reach, while reshaping working capital management with transformative digital solutions.

More about Sidetrade SA

Sidetrade is a global leader in AI-powered Order-to-Cash applications, providing a SaaS platform that enhances cash flow processes using advanced AI technology. The company operates in over 85 countries and serves a diverse range of industries with clients such as Bidcorp, Engie, and Veolia. Sidetrade’s AI platform processes $6.1 trillion in B2B transactions daily, offering insights and automation to optimize working capital and productivity.

data.title: Gewiss Acquires Majority Stake in Beghelli, Plans Delisting
data.description:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Beghelli SPA ( (IT:BE) ) just unveiled an update.

Gewiss S.p.A. has acquired a controlling 75.04% stake in Beghelli S.p.A., prompting a mandatory public purchase offer for the remaining shares. This acquisition aims to delist Beghelli from Euronext Milan, with significant leadership changes following the purchase, potentially impacting Beghelli’s market dynamics and stakeholder interests.

More about Beghelli SPA

Founded in 1982, the Beghelli Group is a prominent player in the technical professional lighting industry, specializing in emergency lighting, photovoltaic systems, home automation, and security solutions. The company is known for its focus on technological innovation and product design, maintaining a strong market presence with operations in Europe, the Far East, and North America, and a commercial reach in over 140 countries.

data.title: Sino Green Land Delays Form 10-Q Filing
data.description:
Sino Green Land ( (SGLA) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Sino Green Land Corporation has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the financial period ending December 31, 2024. The delay is primarily due to the additional time needed to compile and analyze supporting documentation and to allow the company’s independent registered public accounting firm to complete its review of the condensed consolidated financial statements. The company anticipates that the report will be filed no later than five calendar days after its original due date. The company does not expect any significant changes in its financial results compared to the same period last year, and it is committed to maintaining compliance with filing requirements. The notification was signed by Wo Kuk Ching, the Chief Executive Officer.

More about Sino Green Land

data.title: 9R Limited Reports Strong Revenue Growth in Q4 2025
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

9R Limited ( (SG:1Y1) ) has issued an announcement.

9R Limited reported a significant increase in revenue for the fourth quarter of 2025, totaling S$3.4 million, up from S$1.3 million the previous year. This growth was driven by the expansion of its lifestyle retail business segment, partially offset by declines in its supply chain business due to weak demand. The company’s gross profit also saw a substantial rise, although administrative expenses increased due to higher costs associated with the new outlets.

More about 9R Limited

9R Limited, incorporated in Singapore, operates primarily in the lifestyle retail industry. The company focuses on karaoke outlets, having expanded its operations with the acquisition of seven Redbox karaoke outlets and the opening of a new outlet at The Exchange TRX mall in Kuala Lumpur.

data.title: Keyera Corp. Achieves Record 2024 Financial Results Across All Segments
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.

Keyera Corp. ( (TSE:KEY) ) has shared an announcement.

Keyera Corp. reported record financial results for 2024, with strong performance across all three business segments. The company achieved an annual adjusted EBITDA of $1.28 billion, driven by record contributions in its Liquids Infrastructure segment and robust results in its Marketing segment. Net earnings reached a record $487 million for the year, underscoring Keyera’s effective strategy execution and financial strength. The company anticipates continued growth through capacity utilization and capital-efficient projects, positioning itself well for future opportunities.

More about Keyera Corp.

Keyera Corp. operates in the energy industry, focusing on integrated value chain services. It provides midstream services such as gathering and processing, liquids infrastructure, and marketing, with significant operations in Canada.

data.title: KT Corporation Achieves Record Revenue Amid Profit Decline
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

An announcement from KT ( (KT) ) is now available.

KT Corporation reported a record high annual revenue for 2024, driven by its core telecommunication services, real estate, and AX platforms. Despite achieving substantial revenue growth, the company faced a significant decline in operating profit due to one-off labor costs, impacting their overall profitability by 50.9% year-over-year. The company is pursuing strategic partnerships and innovations in AI and media to continue transforming its business and improve profitability.

More about KT

KT Corporation operates in the telecommunications industry and is based in Korea. The company offers various services including wireless, broadband, media, and B2B solutions with a focus on technological innovations such as AI and IT services, cloud solutions, and corporate broadband.
